review: Incredible coffee and the rewards program keeps me coming back every month. 10/10 would recommend to friends.
Great beans but the delivery took longer than expected. Still a solid subscription.
The single origin selection is outstanding. I can taste the difference compared to supermarket brands.
Received the wrong order twice. Customer support was slow to respond.
My whole office is obsessed with the StarBrew blend. We upgraded to the office plan last week!
Decent coffee but the loyalty app glitches when I try to redeem rewards. Needs a fix.
Fresh roasts every time. The recycled packaging is a nice eco-friendly touch too.
Really love the variety. Only wish there were more decaf options in the seasonal rotation.
Subscription charged twice this month. Still waiting on a refund after a week.
Amazing quality and the barista tips newsletter is a delightful bonus. Loyal customer for life.
